subject: [PATCH pynfs 02/13] server41tests: test COPY with non-zero offsets

2026-07-09.patch_summary: This patch adds a new test to the pynfs testing framework called server41tests. The test is designed to verify that the COPY operation can be performed with non-zero offsets, specifically copying 4KB from source offset 1024 to destination offset 512 and then reading back the destination to ensure the data landed at the correct position.
